name: Complaints
description: Customer wants to make, escalate, or follow up on a formal complaint with Virgin Media — they are using the word 'complaint' or 'complain' and want to engage with the complaints process. This also covers requests for complaint reference numbers, updates on existing complaints, and escalations to the complaints department. This is not a general expression of frustration or a specific billing/technical/service query.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to make a complaint
I'd like to raise a {complaintStatus} complaint about {complaintTopic}
How do I make a formal complaint?
I want to complain about my {complaintTopic}
Can I get an update on my {complaintStatus} complaint?
I have a complaint reference number and need an update
I've already complained but nothing has been done
I want to {complaintStatus} my complaint — it hasn't been resolved
This is a formal complaint
I need to speak to the complaints department
I raised a complaint last week and I haven't heard back
I want to complain about how I've been treated by {complaintTopic}
My complaint hasn't been resolved and I want to take it further
How do I escalate my complaint to the ombudsman?
I've been going back and forth and I've had enough — I want to complain
Can I get a deadlock letter for my complaint?
I want to make a {complaintStatus} complaint
Nobody has contacted me about my complaint
I complained about {complaintTopic} and the issue is still happening
Where can I find information about your complaints process?
I'm not satisfied with how my complaint has been handled
make a complaint
